Rationale: Accountable for all enterprise data; requires unrestricted visibility for oversight and risk decisions.
Accountable for data within their business domain; approves access and accepts residual risk
Must see business values to investigate and remediate DQ exceptions; confidential fields are not required for that work.
Manages pipelines and storage; requires schema and volume rather than business-sensitive values (least privilege).
Consumes published data for analysis and reporting; receives masked internal values and no confidential fields.
Operates the governance process and metadata; does not require access to sensitive data content.
